case_title: GONZALEZ, MARTIN C/O INSTITUTO LABORAL DE LA RAZA VS GONZALEZ, MARIA ELENA

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GONZALEZ, MARTIN  C/O INSTITUTO LABORAL DE LA RAZA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT GONZALEZ, MARIA ELENA STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
CORRESPONDANCE FROM GOLDEN HAVEN HOT SPRINGS SPA AND RESORT REGARDING NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO THEM BY MISTAKE.

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $330.00 FILED BY GONZALEZ, MARTIN  C/O INSTITUTO LABORAL DE LA RAZA AS TO DEFENDANT GONZALEZ, MARIA ELENA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-11-2000 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT GONZALEZ, MARIA ELENA
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION SEP-11-2000, CONTINUED BY COURT TO OCT-16-2000 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
